title: Accounting Year period totals schema
description: A schema for retrieving account totals for a specific accounting year period.

items.title: Entry
items.description: A specific total for an account in the accounting year period.

totalInBaseCurrency.description: The total entry amount in base currency for the accounting year period.

account.description: A reference to the account totaled.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

fromDate.description: The first date in the period formatted according to ISO-8601(YYYY-MM-DD).

toDate.description: The last date in the period formatted according to ISO-8601(YYYY-MM-DD).

self.description: A unique reference to the totals resource.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: A unique reference to the accounting year periods totals resource.
